title: Examining Plant Physiological Responses to Climate Change through an Evolutionary Lens.
author_string: Becklin, Katie M, Anderson, Jill T, Gerhart, Laci M, Wadgymar, Susana M, Wessinger, Carolyn A et al.
abstract: Integrating knowledge from physiological ecology, evolutionary biology, phylogenetics, and paleobiology provides novel insights into factors driving plant physiological responses to both past and future climate change.
